CHART 188
This native's father will have won name, fame and honours from the
Royalty. The native will be happy with his mother and brothers. He will not
have much affrnity with his .father. The native will be a trustworthy person
(Jupiter-Mars contact) and be will have a clean and chast~ heart and mind.
Saturn has the Moon and Ketu in the succeeding houses and Mercury in

the 7th. Hence, the native will be very

about all over the country. At about

ing life will continue upto his 40th

onwards. Again, at the age of 47-48, .

Ven.
fmally return to his native place and Jupt Dh. Sun Mer.

CHART 189
